summary: Spec review accepts the Stage 6 Lode write-precheck package spine as bounded validate-only package/schema/resource/guard truth for issues #177, #178, #179, and #180.
reviewed_validation_summary: python3 -m py_compile tools/lode_validate_package.py; python3 tools/lode_validate_package.py --registry-index registry/local-packages.json --all --json; git diff --check; loom suite validate/evidence/carrier; loom fact-chain; loom verify passed locally before review artifact commit.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec keeps Lode as package/schema/resource/guard truth owner, limits the batch to validate-only/draft/preview package expression, and excludes true writes, marketplace, hosted sync, runtime execution, Core run truth, Harbor private material, and App UI.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The planned implementation is limited to repo-local package fixture, registry query, validator guard checks, and item-specific Loom carrier for LODE-177.
